mutation_diagnostics.diagnostic_pattern: P_ONE_HOT_SEQUENCE mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=phase_overlap

mutation_diagnostics.trigger_pattern: rst is asserted while enable remains high
mutation_diagnostics.diagnostic_pattern: P_RESET_DISABLE_CLEAR mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=missing_reset
P_COMMAND_MAPPING mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=wrong_command_mapping

mutation_diagnostics.trigger_pattern: phase one or phase three is active
mutation_diagnostics.diagnostic_pattern: P_PHASE_CODE mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=stuck_output

mutation_diagnostics.trigger_pattern: phase one is observed before a complete sequence
mutation_diagnostics.diagnostic_pattern: P_VALID_AFTER_SEQUENCE mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=qualification_count_error
